chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.D-3430 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For katcha peshi. 17-01-2018 Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto A.A.G. Sindh. This is second call. Neither petitioner nor his counsel is present. No intimation received. It is 11.15 a.m. It appears from the record that this petition was filed on 02.11.2017 but since filing this petition, the petitioner is not diligently pursuing this petition, which is dismissed in non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
